exercises.name: Flat DB Bench Press
exercises.note: Up from 55s. Last session hit 12 on final set — time to bump. Control the descent, full press at top.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.note: Hold 135 across all 3 sets. Full retraction at the back, don't let shoulders round on the way out.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.note: Lock in 120 across all sets. Pull to upper chest, controlled return — don't let it yank you up.

exercises.name: Shoulder Press (DB)
exercises.note: Full extension overhead, don't shrug at the top. If 12 feels easy on all 3 sets, go to 40s next time.

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.note: Elbows high, pull to forehead, external rotate at the end. Rear delt + rotator cuff work — don't rush it.

exercises.name: Arms Superset: Rope Pushdown + Hammer Curl
exercises.detail: Rope pushdown 77 lb × 12 + Hammer curl 25 lb × 10 · 3 rounds
exercises.note: No rest between pushdown and curl. Lock elbows on pushdown, neutral grip on hammer — squeeze at the top.

exercises.name: Core Circuit: Dead Bug → Pallof Press → Bicycle Crunch
exercises.detail: Dead bug × 10/side → Pallof press 30 lb × 12/side → Bicycle crunch × 20 · 3 rounds
exercises.rest: Minimal rest between movements, 60s between rounds
exercises.note: Dead bug: lower back stays flat, move slow. Pallof: resist rotation, don't twist. Bicycle: controlled, not rushed.

week.note: Done — leg press 335, leg curl 66/66/77, hip thrust 140, goblet squat 40, step-ups 2 sets
Full rest · stay on nutrition · post-dinner walk if energy allows
Flat bench 57.5s · cable row 135 · lat pulldown 120 · shoulder press 35s · face pulls · arms superset · core circuit
20-min jog or pickleball · easy pace · no gym
Leg press 345 · leg curl 77×3 · hip thrust 150 · goblet squat 45lb · step-ups 3 sets · core circuit
